scenario_results.reason: In-scope request with complete records was progressed through execution status with defense-aware next-action guidance.
Missing modification, acceptance, and approver context returned a blocking evidence-gap summary and required artifact checklist.
Completion request without closeout evidence was blocked and returned a completion-evidence deficiency record.
Out-of-scope authority request was refused with a boundary-safe handoff to legal, finance, and safety owners.
Readiness drift produced exception queue handling with blockers, owners, and correction requirements.
Mission terminology was normalized and mapped to defense-specific artifact outputs.
Missing approver/authority context triggered low-confidence escalation with explicit required-fact retrieval list.
Source-policy mismatch was escalated without authoritative extrapolation.
Adjacent-lane request was routed with complete handoff context and blockers.
Mid-process safety/mission blocker correctly paused progression and reopened exception queue handling.
Tenant-specific adaptation changes were captured as assumptions and blocked until confirmation.
Missing systems-of-truth dependency produced safe dependency escalation and owner-directed return path.

notes: Scenario set covers normal in-scope execution, evidence gap handling, completion prevention, boundary refusals, and adjacent-lane escalation.
All required abilities are represented and mapped for execution-processing-and-fulfillment and cross-industry profile coverage.
Readiness and functionality coverage are marked complete with explicit no retained-implementation runtime claim.
